name: but-first-planning
description: A file-based planning workflow for Claude Code: author a language-agnostic spec, plan it, and build it with coordinated builder agents — the plan-0..plan-6 planning pipeline plus the build loop (build-next-issue, build-sprint, build-tdd, build-improve-architecture, build-assess-drift, build-rubber-duck) and an autopilot that chains every skill's autonomous workflow mode end-to-end — all landing in a single .plan/ workspace.
